summary: Iteration 12 — Admin manual flag overrides (lock-as-minor + flag-as-18+-creator). 14/14 backend tests pass, all UI selectors and flows verified end-to-end via Playwright as admin@clanchat.app. Mutual exclusion (both directions), reason-required toast, audit trail, applied behaviours (adult-cannot-follow-locked-minor + 18+-hidden-from-minor-search) all confirmed. Bob restored to clean state (no flags) at end of run.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 2582 lines (up from 2477) — still well above the 700-line guideline. The /admin/* surface (reports, csam, watchlist, audit, promote, users-by-handle, mark-minor, mark-18plus, purge-demo-accounts) is ~600+ lines and the obvious next router-extraction candidate (backend/routers/admin.py).

admin_mark_minor and admin_mark_18plus accept untyped dict payloads. Other admin endpoints in this file use Pydantic models — these two should follow suit (MarkMinorIn / Mark18PlusIn) for consistent 422-on-bad-shape and OpenAPI docs.

When unlocking a minor (locked:false), code restores is_minor via calc_age(target.get('dob','1900-01-01')) < 18. The same 1900-01-01 fallback is used in the lookup endpoint. Centralizing this in a helper (e.g. dob_to_is_minor(user)) would prevent drift if the cutoff logic changes.
Lookup endpoint returns 13 fields directly — for symmetry with the rest of the admin surface, consider a Pydantic response_model so the contract is enforced and documented.

Frontend Admin.jsx is 460 lines and houses 5 unrelated tabs + their handlers + their JSX. Splitting into <ReportsTab/>, <CsamTab/>, <WatchlistTab/>, <UsersTab/>, <AuditTab/> would improve readability and make each tab independently testable.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all selectors present, lookup → flag → unflag → lock → unlock flow works, mutual-exclusion disabled-state verified in both directions, no console page errors.

test_credentials: admin@clanchat.app / admin123 ; alice@clanchat.app / Password123! ; bob@clanchat.app / Password123! ; teen@clanchat.app / Password123! — all verified working
seed_data_creation: Multiple admin_mark_minor and admin_mark_18plus audit events appended for bob during the run (transient state — bob is restored to no-flags at end). No persistent data changes for any other user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend coverage: /app/backend/tests/test_iter12_admin_flags.py — 14 tests, all green. Key flows covered: lookup (200/404/403), mark-18plus (set/unset/missing-reason-400), mark-minor (set/unset/missing-reason-400), mutual-exclusion both ways (409 with literal error messages), applied behaviour (alice cannot follow locked-minor bob → 403, teen cannot see 18+-flagged bob in /users/search), audit trail. Frontend coverage via Playwright: /admin → admin-tab-users → lookup bob → user-card-bob → reason-required toast → toggle 18+ → admin-flagged label + 'Remove 18+ flag' text + minor-button disabled → unflag → lock-minor → 'admin-locked' + 18+-button disabled → unlock. Use page.on('dialog', auto-accept) to handle the confirm() prompts on lock/flag actions — toggleMinorLock and toggleCreatorFlag both call window.confirm. Onboarding modal can intercept clicks on first run — press Esc after each navigation, or use force=True clicks.

verified_flows.backend_lookup_admin_ok: GET /api/admin/users/by-handle/bob as admin → 200 with all 13 expected keys
verified_flows.backend_mark18_set: POST /mark-18plus {is_creator:true, reason:'app approved'} → 200, nsfw_account+flagged_18plus_by_admin true, reason persisted
verified_flows.backend_mark18_unset_no_reason: POST /mark-18plus {is_creator:false} → 200, fields cleared, no reason required
verified_flows.backend_mark_minor_set: POST /mark-minor {locked:true, reason:'safety hold'} → 200, is_minor true even though DOB is adult, minor_locked_by_admin true
verified_flows.backend_mark_minor_unset: POST /mark-minor {locked:false} → 200, is_minor reverts to DOB-derived (false for bob)
verified_flows.backend_mutex_18plus_then_minor: Flag 18+ then lock minor → 409 'Account is flagged as 18+ creator. Remove that flag first.'
verified_flows.backend_mutex_minor_then_18plus: Lock minor then flag 18+ → 409 'Account is a minor (DOB or admin-locked). Cannot flag as 18+ creator.'
verified_flows.backend_applied_locked_minor_blocks_foll: alice POST /follow/{bob_id} after bob is admin-locked-minor → 403
verified_flows.backend_applied_18plus_hidden_from_teen: teen GET /users/search?q=bob after bob flagged 18+ → bob NOT in results
verified_flows.backend_audit_trail: GET /admin/audit?limit=30 includes admin_mark_minor and admin_mark_18plus events with target_user_id, target_handle, reason, admin_id, at
verified_flows.frontend_users_tab_visible: All 5 admin tabs (reports, csam, watchlist, users, audit) render with correct data-testid
verified_flows.frontend_lookup_form: user-lookup-handle input + user-lookup-submit button render and submit on Enter or click
verified_flows.frontend_user_card_render: user-card-bob shows two status boxes (is_minor + 18+ creator) with DOB-derived flag and admin-flagged indicator
verified_flows.frontend_reason_required_toast: Clicking user-toggle-18plus with empty user-flag-reason → toast 'Reason required (audit trail)' appears
verified_flows.frontend_flag_18plus_flow: Fill reason → click user-toggle-18plus → confirm dialog auto-accepted → card refreshes with nsfw_account:true, admin-flagged label, button text becomes 'Remove 18+ flag'
verified_flows.frontend_mutex_minor_disabled: When bob is flagged 18+, user-toggle-minor button is_disabled=True; after removing flag it re-enables
verified_flows.frontend_mutex_18plus_disabled: When bob is locked as minor, user-toggle-18plus button is_disabled=True; after unlock it re-enables
verified_flows.frontend_cleanup: Bob ends run with no flags (verified via /admin/users/by-handle/bob)

rca of the issue: n/a — no production bug. Feature works end-to-end as specified.
